sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88522" key="prosamu/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσᾰμύσσω</orth>, <sense id="n88522.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">irritate still further,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τόπον φαρμάκῳ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:30:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.30.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
